calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-25-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Theresia Sandhu, Esq. 408-313-1134, specially appearing for Defendant Albert Downing.
No Other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Counsel reports the case settled on 9/30/19. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

The tentative ruling is vacated. Off calendar, case has settled in September, per the representation of Specially Appearing Counsel in Court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
